phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Exposição Luso starts
phrases.cultural_note: The Exposição Luso is a temporary or permanent exhibition; the entrance is usually well-marked but ask staff for the exact spot.

likely_response.translation_en: In the central corridor, on the right.

responses.english: In the central corridor, on the right.

likely_response.translation_en: At the ticket office, ask the staff.

responses.english: At the ticket office, ask the staff.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Jogos de Tabuleiro are
phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar os jogos de tabuleiro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR OOSH ZHAW-goosh DIH tuh-boo-LAY-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: Direct spatial references are preferred in Portuguese museum guidance.

likely_response.local: Pergunte na receção ou a um monitor de visitas.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN OHW AH OONNG moo-nee-TOHR DIH vee-ZEE-tuhsh.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask at the reception or a guide.

responses.english: Ask at the reception or a guide.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih NUH reh-sih-SOWN OHW AH OONNG moo-nee-TOHR DIH vee-ZEE-tuhsh.
responses.french: Pergunte na receção ou a um monitor de visitas.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the board games room is
phrases.text_local: Em que piso fica a sala dos jogos?
phrases.pronunciation: AYNG KIH PEE-zoo FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DOOSH ZHAW-goosh?
phrases.cultural_note: Portuguese venues typically use 'térreo' for ground level navigation.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para Jogos de Tabuleiro.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh ZHAW-goosh DIH tuh-boo-LAY-roo.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to Board Games.

responses.english: Follow the signs to Board Games.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh ZHAW-goosh DIH tuh-boo-LAY-roo.
responses.french: Siga as placas para Jogos de Tabuleiro.

phrases.text_local: Onde se compra o bilhete de entrada?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih SIH KOHMP-ruh AW bee-LYEH-tih DIH ayngt-RAH-duh?
phrases.cultural_note: Ticket sales are typically handled immediately upon arrival in Portugal.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, bilheteira logo à entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, bee-lyih-TAY-ruh LAW-goo AH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good day, ticket booth right at the entrance.

responses.english: Good day, ticket booth right at the entrance.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, bee-lyih-TAY-ruh LAW-goo AH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.french: Bom dia, bilheteira logo à entrada.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Jogos de Tabuleiro are
phrases.text_local: Onde estão os Jogos de Tabuleiro?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih ihsh-TOWN OOSH ZHAW-goosh DIH tuh-boo-LAY-roo?
phrases.cultural_note: Os Jogos de Tabuleiro fazem parte da exposição permanente do museu, que está organizada por temas. Os funcionários podem indicar a localização exata.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, estão na Exposição Luso.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ihsh-TOWN NUH ehsh-poo-zee-SOWN LOO-zoo.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, they are in the Exposição Luso.

responses.english: Good morning, they are in the Exposição Luso.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ihsh-TOWN NUH ehsh-poo-zee-SOWN LOO-zoo.
responses.french: Bom dia, estão na Exposição Luso.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar a Sala dos Bonecos?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AH SAH-luh DOOSH boo-NEH-koosh?

likely_response.local: Dirija-se à bilheteira à entrada para obter indicações sobre a localização da Sala dos Bonecos.
likely_response.pronunciation: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh AH ayngt-RAH-duh PUH-ruh awb-TEHR een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH SOHB-rih AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN DUH SAH-luh DOOSH boo-NEH-koosh.
likely_response.translation_en: Go to the ticket office at the entrance for directions to the Doll Room.

responses.english: Go to the ticket office at the entrance for directions to the Doll Room.
responses.phonetic: dee-REE-zhuh-SIH AH bee-lyih-TAY-ruh AH ayngt-RAH-duh PUH-ruh awb-TEHR een-dee-kuh-SOHNYSH SOHB-rih AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN DUH SAH-luh DOOSH boo-NEH-koosh.
responses.french: Dirija-se à bilheteira à entrada para obter indicações sobre a localização da Sala dos Bonecos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Lata collection is
phrases.text_local: Desculpe, onde fica a Coleção de Lata?
phrases.pronunciation: dihsh-KOOW-pih, OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH koo-lih-SOWN DIH LAH-tuh?
phrases.cultural_note: The Coleção de Lata is a prominent exhibit, but its location may vary; the staff can point you to the correct room.

likely_response.translation_en: In the first room on the left.

responses.english: In the first room on the left.
